messages.text: line 3 throwing UNLABELLED PRODUCT and kicking parts to reject
the product detect saw a product but no label got placed - missed apply. check label supply, peel tip threading, and the apply timing/photocell
labels are fine but the apply photocell was nudged out of alignment
realign the product photocell to the apply point and re-run the apply delay so the label lands on the product, not the gap
realigned, apply timing retuned, rejects stopped
